sentence: 公司已经制定了应急预案。
pinyin: Gōngsī yǐjīng zhìdìng le yìngjí yù'àn.
english: The company has already formulated an emergency contingency plan.

sentence: 欢迎各位到访我们的展厅。
pinyin: Huānyíng gèwèi dàofǎng wǒmen de zhǎntīng.
english: Welcome to all who are visiting our showroom.

sentence: 你在做啥子？快来帮我。
pinyin: Nǐ zài zuò sházǐ? Kuài lái bāng wǒ.
english: What are you doing? Come help me quickly.

meaning: 1. to write a letter (to the authorities); 2. to present a petition
sentence: 居民联名上书，要求修缮道路。
pinyin: Jūmín liánmíng shàngshū, yāoqiú xiūshàn dàolù.
english: Residents jointly submitted a petition requesting road repairs.

sentence: 警察正在梳理这起案情。
pinyin: Jǐngchá zhèngzài shūlǐ zhè qǐ ànqíng.
english: Police are sorting through the details of this case.

sentence: 两个方案之间的差异性比较大。
pinyin: Liǎng gè fāng'àn zhījiān de chāyìxìng bǐjiào dà.
english: The difference between the two plans is quite significant.

sentence: 她考上了北京师范大学，全家都很高兴。
pinyin: Tā kǎoshàng le Běijīng Shīfàn Dàxué, quánjiā dōu hěn gāoxìng.
english: She got into Beijing Normal University, and the whole family was thrilled.

sentence: 这本书是他们两人合著的。
pinyin: Zhè běn shū shì tāmen liǎng rén hézhù de.
english: This book was co-authored by the two of them.

sentence: 这场演唱会吸引了数百万人观看。
pinyin: Zhè chǎng yǎnchànghuì xīyǐn le shù bǎiwàn rén guānkàn.
english: The concert attracted several million viewers.

meaning: wing (of an air force); sports team representing a combination of enti
sentence: 空军联队的战机昨日举行例行训练。
pinyin: Kōng jūn lián duì de zhàn jī zuó rì jǔ xíng lì xíng xùn liàn.
english: The air force wing's fighter jets carried out routine training exercises yesterday.

meaning: vocational high school (abbr. to 職高|职高[zhi2 gao1])
sentence: 他选择读职业高中，毕业后直接进入汽车修理行业。
pinyin: Tā xuǎn zé dú zhí yè gāo zhōng, bì yè hòu zhí jiē jìn rù qì chē xiū lǐ háng yè.
english: He chose to attend a vocational high school and went straight into the auto repair industry after graduating.

meaning: standing image (of a Buddha or saint)
sentence: 广场上有一尊金色的立像。
pinyin: Guǎngchǎng shàng yǒu yī zūn jīnsè de lì xiàng.
english: There is a golden standing statue in the plaza.

sentence: 这个词的字义很容易理解。
pinyin: Zhège cí de zì yì hěn róngyì lǐjiě.
english: The meaning of this character is very easy to understand.

sentence: 他这次去上海是出公干的。
pinyin: Tā zhè cì qù Shànghǎi shì chū gōng gàn de.
english: He's going to Shanghai this time on official business.

sentence: 奶奶自己在家酿米酒。
pinyin: Nǎinai zìjǐ zài jiā niàng mǐ jiǔ.
english: Grandma brews her own rice wine at home.

sentence: 她每天都会在社群上贴文分享生活。
pinyin: Tā měi tiān dōu huì zài shèqún shàng tiē wén fēnxiǎng shēnghuó.
english: She posts on social media every day to share her life.

meaning: to get oneself out of trouble
sentence: 遇到危险时要学会自救。
pinyin: Yù dào wēixiǎn shí yào xuéhuì zì jiù.
english: When you're in danger, you need to know how to save yourself.

meaning: to return to the same school and repeat a course from which one has al
sentence: 他高考没发挥好，决定复读一年。
pinyin: Tā gāokǎo méi fāhuī hǎo, juédìng fù dú yī nián.
english: He didn't do well on the college entrance exam and decided to repeat the year.

meaning: first (hotel of its type, store of its type etc)
sentence: 这是城里首家专卖素食的餐厅。
pinyin: Zhè shì chéng lǐ shǒu jiā zhuān mài sùshí de cāntīng.
english: This is the first restaurant in town dedicated to vegetarian food.

sentence: 两人相视一笑，什么都不用说了。
pinyin: Liǎng rén xiāng shì yī xiào, shénme dōu bù yòng shuō le.
english: The two of them looked at each other and smiled — no words were needed.

sentence: 爷爷曾经是一名志愿军战士。
pinyin: Yéye céngjīng shì yī míng zhì yuàn jūn zhànshì.
english: Grandpa was once a volunteer army soldier.

sentence: 她入行多年，对娱乐圈的规则很了解。
pinyin: Tā rùháng duō nián, duì yú lè quān de guīzé hěn liǎojiě.
english: She's been in the industry for many years and knows the rules of show business well.

sentence: 台湾中北部今天有雨。
pinyin: Táiwān zhōng běi bù jīntiān yǒu yǔ.
english: There will be rain in the north-central part of Taiwan today.

meaning: the subject under discussion; the point at issue
sentence: 我们回到本题，继续讨论计划。
pinyin: Wǒmen huí dào běn tí, jìxù tǎolùn jìhuà.
english: Let's get back to the subject at hand and continue discussing the plan.

meaning: (military) to mount a secondary attack; (fig.) to assist in tackling a
sentence: 他在比赛中完成了两次助攻。
pinyin: Tā zài bǐsài zhōng wánchéng le liǎng cì zhù gōng.
english: He made two assists during the game.

sentence: 今年夏天中南部地区特别干旱。
pinyin: Jīnnián xiàtiān zhōng nán bù dìqū tèbié gānhàn.
english: The south-central region has been especially dry this summer.

sentence: 学校每学期都会对各班进行评比。
pinyin: Xuéxiào měi xuéqī dōu huì duì gè bān jìnxíng píng bǐ.
english: The school evaluates and ranks each class every semester.

sentence: 这家咖啡馆的装潢别具一格。
pinyin: Zhè jiā kāfēiguǎn de zhuānghuáng bié jù yī gé.
english: This café's décor has a style all its own.

sentence: 今年小麦单产比去年提高了不少。
pinyin: Jīnnián xiǎomài dān chǎn bǐ qùnián tígāo le bù shǎo.
english: This year's wheat yield per unit area is significantly higher than last year's.

meaning: trustworthy; reliable; to believe something to be true
sentence: 做生意最重要的是信实，不能骗人。
pinyin: Zuò shēngyi zuì zhòngyào de shì xìn shí, bù néng piàn rén.
english: The most important thing in business is being trustworthy — you can't cheat people.

meaning: notes on poetry, an essay genre consisting of informal commentary on p
sentence: 他花了两年时间整理古代诗话文献。
pinyin: Tā huā le liǎng nián shíjiān zhěnglǐ gǔdài shī huà wénxiàn.
english: He spent two years sorting through ancient poetry criticism documents.

meaning: to speed up; to accelerate; (economics) growth rate
sentence: 今年经济增速比预期要快。
pinyin: Jīnnián jīngjì zēng sù bǐ yùqī yào kuài.
english: This year's economic growth rate is faster than expected.

sentence: 幸亏你提醒我，我差点忘了开会。
pinyin: Xìngkuī nǐ tíxǐng wǒ, wǒ chàdiǎn wàngle kāihuì.
english: Luckily you reminded me — I almost forgot about the meeting.

sentence: 他早上吃了火腿鸡蛋三明治。
pinyin: Tā zǎoshang chī le huǒtuǐ jīdàn sānmíngzhì.
english: He had a ham and egg sandwich in the morning.

meaning: 1. to squeeze; 2. to press; 3. to extrude
sentence: 不要挤压这个包装盒。
pinyin: Bùyào jǐyā zhège bāozhuāng hé.
english: Don't squeeze this packaging box.

meaning: 1. inherent qualities; 2. natural qualities; 3. distinctive character;
sentence: 不管走红多久，她始终保持着朴实的本色。
pinyin: Bù guǎn zǒu hóng duō jiǔ, tā shǐ zhōng bǎo chí zhe pǔ shí de běn sè.
english: No matter how long she's been famous, she has always kept her down-to-earth true self.

sentence: 医生用这种草药治病已经多年了。
pinyin: Yī shēng yòng zhè zhǒng cǎo yào zhì bìng yǐ jīng duō nián le.
english: The doctor has been using this herbal medicine to treat illness for many years.

meaning: 1. to hold up (as an model); 2. to hold in esteem; 3. to revere; 4. to
sentence: 他一向崇尚简单自然的生活方式。
pinyin: Tā yīxiàng chóngshàng jiǎndān zìrán de shēnghuó fāngshì.
english: He has always advocated a simple and natural lifestyle.

meaning: 1. in former years; 2. in previous years
sentence: 今年的梅雨比往年来得早。
pinyin: Jīnnián de méiyǔ bǐ wǎngnián lái de zǎo.
english: This year's rainy season came earlier than in previous years.

sentence: 傍晚的海风吹来，感觉特别凉爽。
pinyin: Bàngwǎn de hǎifēng chuī lái, gǎnjué tèbié liángshuǎng.
english: The evening sea breeze blew in and felt wonderfully cool and refreshing.

sentence: 他患病期间，同事们都来探望他。
pinyin: Tā huànbìng qījiān, tóngshìmen dōu lái tànwàng tā.
english: While he was ill, his colleagues all came to visit him.

meaning: to storm a strategic pass; fig. to tackle a key problem
sentence: 团队正在攻关这个技术难题。
pinyin: Tuánduì zhèngzài gōngguān zhège jìshù nántí.
english: The team is working hard to tackle this technical challenge.

sentence: 他练了多年跳远，成绩不错。
pinyin: Tā liànle duō nián tiàoyuǎn, chéngjì búcuò.
english: He has trained in the long jump for many years and has good results.

sentence: 闪电过后，紧接着响起了雷声。
pinyin: Shǎndiàn guòhòu, jǐn jiēzhe xiǎngqǐ le léishēng.
english: Right after the lightning, thunder immediately followed.

sentence: 他刚到北京，正在找地方租房。
pinyin: Tā gāng dào Běijīng, zhèngzài zhǎo dìfang zūfáng.
english: He just arrived in Beijing and is looking for a place to rent.

sentence: 夏天蚊子很多，晚上要关窗。
pinyin: Xiàtiān wénzi hěn duō, wǎnshang yào guān chuāng.
english: There are lots of mosquitoes in summer; close the windows at night.

meaning: To reduce speed, to slow down
sentence: 看到红绿灯他赶快减速。
pinyin: Kàn dào hónglǜdēng tā gǎnkuài jiǎnsù.
english: He quickly slowed down when he saw the traffic light.

meaning: 1. an item in accounts; 2. an entry
sentence: 月底要核对一下账目。
pinyin: Yuèdǐ yào héduì yīxià zhàngmù.
english: We need to check the accounts at the end of the month.

sentence: 球踢出边线，换对方发球。
pinyin: Qiú tī chū biānxiàn, huàn duìfāng fāqiú.
english: The ball went out of bounds, so the other team gets to throw it in.

meaning: 1. aids and advisors of top officials
sentence: 他是市长身边最信任的幕僚。
pinyin: Tā shì shìzhǎng shēnbiān zuì xìnrèn de mùliáo.
english: He is the most trusted aide by the mayor's side.
